title: Robust registration of calcium images by learned contrast synthesis
journal: IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: BigWarp is an interactive tool for manual landmark-based deformable image registration using thin plate spline transformations, designed for large biological image volumes where automated registration fails. It enables landmark placement in synchronized BigDataViewer windows with real-time transformation preview.
notes: BigWarp publication details need verification. The tool was released around 2016 but the primary reference may be Bogovic et al. 2016 in a different venue, or documented primarily via the Fiji wiki. The ISBI paper listed may actually be about a different topic; the BigWarp paper may be unpublished or in a methods collection.
